name: Common CAPL Gotchas
title: Common CAPL Pitfalls and Gotchas (EQ07 Project)
intro: Hard-won lessons from EQ07. Each gotcha includes symptom, root cause, fix. Append-only.

sections.heading: 1. on timer fires even when measurement is paused

paragraphs: SYMPTOM: Timer callback fires after Pause Measurement.
ROOT CAUSE: Timers are independent of measurement state.
FIX: Cancel in on stop, check isMeasurementRunning() in handler.
SYMPTOM: output(msg) sends on different channel, causing cross-talk.
ROOT CAUSE: output() uses channel of most recent RX message.
FIX: Always specify channel: output(msg, CAN_CHANNEL_1);

sections.heading: 3. setSignal with wrong type silently fails

paragraphs: SYMPTOM: Signal value doesnt change, no error.
ROOT CAUSE: setSignal() is type-strict. long vs dword may compile but fail at runtime.
FIX: Use project wrappers (setSignalDword, setSignalLong) for explicit checks.
SYMPTOM: Diagnostic test fails intermittently; tester sees old response.
ROOT CAUSE: DiagSendRequest returns immediately; code after assumes response available.
FIX: Use Diag_GetResponse callback or DiagSendRequestAndWaitForResponse.
